title: Visibility+
description: All in One PVP Essentials. Low Fire, Low Shield, Small Totem, Etc. RPO compatible.
body:
**Visibility+** is a highly _customizable_ Minecraft resource pack built around player choice. By default, it includes the essentials: Low Fire, Low Shield, Smaller/No Particles, Smaller totem, etc. 

Toggle dark UI, custom fonts, 3D maces, short swords, animated totems, fire variants, smooth crystals, HD shields, blue cobwebs, white obsidian, smaller items, and more, all from a clean in-game menu powered by the Respackwopts mod. Every feature is optional and defaults to a vanilla-friendly experience, so you only enable what you want.
